entries.description: Added "Save Page as Image" and "Download Narration" buttons to allow users to preserve their generated comic stories. "Save Page" uses a canvas to composite the comic illustration, the story title, and the narration text into a single downloadable PNG image.

    *   Replaced the standard spinner with a bouncing animation of art and star emojis to keep kids entertained while waiting.

    *   Updated `index.html` to include the styles needed for these "chunky" UI elements.
